title: The Voyage of Bran
description: Bran sails to the Land of Women beyond the sea, where there is no sorrow, sickness, or death.
introduction: Bran sails to the Land of Women beyond the sea, where there is no sorrow, sickness, or death.

translation.original_text: Tir na m-ban, tir n-ingnad, tir nach cian do-roacht.
translation.text: The Land of Women, a wondrous land — a land not far to reach.
